name: color-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for color palette generation and conversion — HEX, RGB, HSL

tools.name: generate_palette
tools.description: Generate a color palette. Harmonies: random, analogous, complementary, triadic, monochromatic, warm, cool, pastel, neon.

tools.name: export_palette
tools.description: Export colors to CSS, Tailwind, SCSS, or JSON format.
